description.ko: 사막의 갈라진 진흙부터 고대 숲의 무성한 이끼까지, 지구상에서 발견되는 다양한 질감에 대한 고화질 탐구입니다.
description.en: A high-definition exploration of the diverse textures found on Earth, from the cracked clay of deserts to the lush moss of ancient forests.

prompt: Cinematic macro photography of Earth's surface textures, hyper-realistic, top-down view of cracked desert earth, lush green mossy river stones, and swirling ocean foam, 8k resolution, intricate details, natural lighting, earthy color palette.
